name: vmpfc-value
description: vmPFC continuous value attribution (RESEARCH.md §PFC.vmPFC). Two near-equal-topic memories. The 'good' option accumulates positive outcomes; the 'bad' option accumulates negative outcomes. Without --value-aware, the bad option wins on raw lexical dominance; with --value-aware, the wider [0.7,1.3] multiplier flips the ranking. Premise recalibrated 2026-07-09 for the #t2 embed-text format (path tags removed from embeddings de-compressed similarity gaps): the pair was MEASURED to a raw no-outcome edge of 1.45x (MongoDB/Postgres), inside the (1.353, 1.857) window where the always-on outcome boost [0.85,1.15] preserves the bad option's no-flag win AND the --value-aware swing [0.7,1.3] flips it. See docs/plans/2026-07-09-recall-determinism.md.
remembers: Postgres works well for backend data storage
MongoDB is the backend database choice for backend database storage and backend database queries
